content:
**Pushed:** `eda07b19` on branch `3407-update-homepage-welcome-text` (PR #3408). **What changed:** `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx` — replaced the conditional `!user`/`user` welcome messages with a single static `

Welcome from kody — verify run 1778701211049

` per issue #3407 requirements. The draft PR will update and Vercel will redeploy the same preview URL automatically.
